geography: TX - Hill Country + exurban DFW/Houston/SA + East TX rural

vertical_specific_notes.no_website_handling: Many TX well drillers operate WITHOUT a website. For those: successor verification via TDLR WWD/WWPI license search at same address + LinkedIn + BBB + county clerk DBA. No-website = positive coasting signal but cap A-tier confidence at medium.
vertical_specific_notes.successor_definition: Second licensed driller (WWD) at the company; same-surname family on TDLR or BBB; long-tenured pump installer (10+ yrs) with foreman/co-owner title; cross-checked via WWD license search at same business address.
vertical_specific_notes.family_succession_bias: STRONG in this trade - many 'coasting solo' reads will have a son/daughter already in the business; verify thoroughly before A-tier.
